backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that exposes a single `getAppInfo` function returning the app name, version, and an empty icon blob.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs (Video Downloader tab, VideoDownloader module, and its glassmorphism styling) to their affected files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary of short summaries for each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key implementation details of every module, hook, and component in the project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes, including colors for background, foreground, primary, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell that mounts the React app into a `#root` div and loads the TypeScript entry point `src/main.tsx`.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that manages the active tab state and conditionally renders one of six modules (ImageEditor, PDFConverter, ImageConverter, PassportPhotoConverter, BackgroundRemover, VideoDownloader) based on the selected TabId.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying copyright year, a local-processing notice, and a branded link to caffeine.ai using the current hostname as a UTM parameter.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header with the app logo, title, a backend connectivity badge, and a light/dark theme toggle button.
frontend/src/components/TabNavigation.ts: Horizontally scrollable tab bar rendering six tabs (Image Editor, PDF Converter, Image Converter, Passport Photo, BG Remover, Video Downloader) with active-state highlighting and description display.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor, using an anonymous actor when unauthenticated and invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor instance changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines a React Query hook `useAppInfo` that fetches application info from the backend actor when available.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind, and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes including colors, sidebar, and chart variables, plus reusable component utility classes.
frontend/src/lib/jszip.ts: Lazy-loads JSZip from CDN and exports utilities to create ZIP archives from file entries and trigger browser downloads, plus a helper to convert data URLs to Blobs.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/modules/BackgroundRemover.t: Main background remover UI component that manages canvas-based image rendering, brush drawing, crop, rotation, and delegates to sub-components and the `useBackgroundRemover` hook for state and processing logic.
frontend/src/modules/BackgroundRemover/B: Renders a draggable slider component that lets users compare the original and background-removed images side by side.
UI panel for controlling brush tool settings (size, paint/erase mode, active state) and triggering undo of the last stroke.
frontend/src/modules/BackgroundRemover/C: Renders an interactive SVG/div crop overlay with draggable corner, edge, and move handles, converting between display and image coordinate spaces via scale factors.
frontend/src/modules/BackgroundRemover/E: Provides UI controls for downloading the background-removed result as PNG or JPG (direct download or ZIP), with zoom controls, reset, and background image upload options.
frontend/src/modules/BackgroundRemover/R: Renders the background removal settings panel including auto-detect button, transparent/custom-color output mode toggle, color picker with presets, and the main remove-background action button.
frontend/src/modules/BackgroundRemover/u: Custom React hook managing all background remover state (image, mask, brush, crop, zoom, rotation) and operations including undo history, mask snapshots, and compositing the final result canvas.
frontend/src/modules/ImageConverter.tsx: Top-level Image Converter module with a 4-step tabbed UI (Upload, Settings, Preview, Export) that wires together file input, conversion settings, preview, and export functionality via the useImageConversion hook.
frontend/src/modules/ImageConverter/Batc: Reusable drag-and-drop batch image upload panel that displays a thumbnail grid of loaded images with per-image removal and a clear-all option.
frontend/src/modules/ImageConverter/Befo: Renders a draggable before/after slider component that overlays the converted image on top of the original, allowing users to compare them by dragging a divider.
frontend/src/modules/ImageConverter/Conv: Provides a settings UI panel for image conversion options including output format, quality, resize mode (dimensions or percentage), aspect ratio lock, and filter presets.
frontend/src/modules/ImageConverter/Expo: Displays the export UI with a convert-all button, progress bar, per-image download buttons, and a ZIP download option for all converted images.
frontend/src/modules/ImageConverter/useI: Custom React hook that manages image conversion logic including canvas-based format conversion, resizing, filter application, progress tracking, and ZIP download functionality.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor.tsx: Main image editor component that composes canvas editing tools (adjustments, crop, resize, text overlays, filters) with undo/redo support, zoom controls, and export/ZIP download functionality.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/Adjustm: Renders sliders for adjusting image brightness, contrast, and saturation, with a reset button to restore default values.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/CropOve: Renders an interactive crop overlay div on top of the image canvas, supporting drag handles (corners, edges, move) to adjust a crop rectangle, with Apply and Cancel buttons.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/CropToo: Sidebar panel for cropping that provides a button to start interactive crop mode and quick aspect-ratio preset buttons (Free, 1:1, 4:3, 16:9, 3:2) plus a reset option.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/ExportD: Modal dialog for exporting the edited image, allowing the user to choose format (JPEG, PNG, WebP) and quality, then triggering a download.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/FilterP: Displays a grid of CSS-filter-based preset buttons (Original, Vintage, B&W, HDR, etc.) that apply a named filter to the image state.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/ImageUp: Handles image input via file drag-and-drop, file picker, or live camera capture, passing the resulting data URL to the parent via onImageLoad.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/ResizeT: Sidebar panel with width/height inputs and an optional locked-aspect-ratio toggle that calls onResize with the new pixel dimensions when applied.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/TextLay: Renders draggable and rotatable text layer handles over the canvas display area, translating mouse events into canvas-coordinate position and rotation updates.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/TextOve: React component providing a UI panel for configuring and adding text layers to an image canvas, supporting font, color, size, shadow, outline options, and click-to-place or center-add placement modes.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/Transfo: React component rendering buttons to rotate an image by 90° or 180° and toggle horizontal/vertical flips by updating the shared ImageState.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/useImag: Custom React hook managing image editing state (brightness, contrast, rotation, filters, crop, text layers) with undo/redo history and a renderCanvas function that applies CSS filters and draws text layers onto an HTML canvas.
frontend/src/modules/PassportPhotoConver: The main Passport Photo Converter page component that handles image upload, preset/size selection, and composes sub-panels for copy grid preview, text customization, and export.
A React component that renders a canvas preview of passport photos tiled on an A4 sheet, with optional text labels beneath each photo.
React component providing export controls for passport photos, supporting PNG/PDF download, print, and ZIP of individual photos via buttons with loading states.
React component for configuring a text overlay on passport photos, with controls for content, font family, size, color, bold/italic, and alignment.
Custom React hook managing passport photo state and logic, including size presets, image processing with sharpening/enhancements, A4 canvas layout, and text overlay rendering.
frontend/src/modules/PDFConverter.tsx: Top-level PDF Converter module component with a four-step tabbed UI (Files, Merge/Split, Pages, Create) that composes sub-components and wires them to the usePDFOperations hook.
frontend/src/modules/PDFConverter/Create: Component for building a PDF from uploaded or camera-captured images, with per-image enhancement, optional compression, and ZIP download of the resulting PDF.
frontend/src/modules/PDFConverter/MergeS: Component providing UI controls to select and merge multiple PDFs or split a single PDF at a given page, with download and ZIP export options for the results.
frontend/src/modules/PDFConverter/PageMa: A React component that loads PDF thumbnails via PDF.js from CDN, allowing users to select a PDF file, view page thumbnails, select pages, and reorder them via drag-and-drop.
frontend/src/modules/PDFConverter/PDFFil: A React component that renders a drag-and-drop upload zone and a scrollable list of loaded PDF files, with options to add or remove individual files.
frontend/src/modules/PDFConverter/PDFUpl: A React component similar to PDFFileList that provides a drag-and-drop PDF upload zone with dragging state highlight and a list of uploaded files with remove buttons.
frontend/src/modules/PDFConverter/usePDF: A custom React hook that manages PDF file state and operations (add, remove, reorder, merge, split, remove pages, create from images) using pdf-lib loaded from CDN.
frontend/src/modules/VideoDownloader.tsx: React component that fetches YouTube video metadata via the YouTube Data API or handles Facebook URLs, displaying video info and quality-based download options.
frontend/src/types/declarations.d.ts: TypeScript module declarations providing type definitions for CDN-loaded libraries: pdf-lib, pdfjs-dist, and jszip.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom colors (using oklch), fonts, border radii, shadows, and keyframe animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state (version 17) for an All-in-One Conversion Tool web app with modules for image editing, PDF conversion, image conversion, passport photo, and background removal. Records architectural notes, known issues, and existing feature definitions.
